title: BEM-544 live Telegram sender v3 no urllib
objective:
Run script:
"""
scripts = Path('scripts')
scripts.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
workflows = Path('.github/workflows')
workflows.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
reports = Path('governance/reports')
reports.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
proofs = Path('governance/codex/proofs')
proofs.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
protocols = Path('governance/protocols')
protocols.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
state_path = Path('governance/state/contour_status.json')
transport = Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
outbox = Path('governance/telegram_outbox.jsonl')
outbox.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

picker = scripts / 'telegram_outbox_pick.py'
picker_lines = [
'#!/usr/bin/env python3',
'import json',
'from pathlib import Path',
'',
'OUTBOX = Path("governance/telegram_outbox.jsonl")',
'TRANSPORT = Path("governance/transport/results.jsonl")',
'PICK = Path("governance/tmp/telegram_pick.json")',
'',
'def load_jsonl(path):',
'    rows = []',
'    if not path.exists():',
'        return rows',
'    for line_no, line in enumerate(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore").splitlines(), start=1):',
'        if not line.strip():',
'            continue',
'        try:',
'            rows.append((line_no, json.loads(line)))',
'        except Exception:',
'            pass',
'    return rows',
'',
'def stable_hash(text):',
'    total = 0',
'    for ch in text:',
'        total = (total * 131 + ord(ch)) % 1000000007',
'    return "len_" + str(len(text)) + "_sum_" + str(total)',
'',
'def already_delivered(line_no, msg_hash):',
'    for _, rec in load_jsonl(TRANSPORT):',
'        if rec.get("record_type") == "telegram_delivery_result" and rec.get("outbox_line") == line_no and rec.get("message_hash") == msg_hash and rec.get("status") in ["sent", "sent_synthetic"]:',
'            return True',
'    return False',
'',
'pick = {"found": False}',
'for line_no, rec in load_jsonl(OUTBOX):',
'    if rec.get("status") not in ["queued_for_sender", "queued"]:',
'        continue',
'    message = str(rec.get("message", "")).strip()',
'    if not message:',
'        continue',
'    msg_hash = stable_hash(message)',
'    if already_delivered(line_no, msg_hash):',
'        continue',
'    pick = {"found": True, "outbox_line": line_no, "cycle_id": rec.get("cycle_id", "telegram-outbox-live"), "message": message, "message_hash": msg_hash}',
'    break',
'PICK.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'PICK.write_text(json.dumps(pick, ensure_ascii=False), encoding="utf-8")',
'print(json.dumps(pick, ensure_ascii=False))',
]
picker.write_text('\n'.join(picker_lines) + '\n')

recorder = scripts / 'telegram_delivery_record.py'
recorder_lines = [
'#!/usr/bin/env python3',
'import json',
'from pathlib import Path',
'',
'PICK = Path("governance/tmp/telegram_pick.json")',
'TRANSPORT = Path("governance/transport/results.jsonl")',
'STATE = Path("governance/state/contour_status.json")',
'STATUS = Path("governance/tmp/telegram_status.txt")',
'',
'pick = json.loads(PICK.read_text(encoding="utf-8")) if PICK.exists() else {"found": False}',
'status_text = STATUS.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore").strip() if STATUS.exists() else "failed:status_missing"',
'if not pick.get("found"):',
'    result = {"sent": 0, "failed": 0, "skipped": 1, "reason": "no_queued_message"}',
'else:',
'    ok = status_text == "sent" or status_text == "sent_synthetic"',
'    delivery = {',
'        "record_type": "telegram_delivery_result",',
'        "cycle_id": pick.get("cycle_id"),',
'        "source": "telegram_sender",',
'        "from_role": "telegram_sender",',
'        "to_role": "curator",',
'        "status": status_text if ok else "failed",',
'        "outbox_line": pick.get("outbox_line"),',
'        "message_hash": pick.get("message_hash"),',
'        "attempt": 1,',
'        "retry_allowed": not ok,',
'        "next_retry_at": None if ok else "next_hour",',
'        "artifact_path": "governance/telegram_outbox.jsonl",',
'        "commit_sha": None,',
'        "blocker": None if ok else {"code": "TELEGRAM_DELIVERY_FAILED", "message": status_text},',
'        "created_at": "workflow_runtime",',
'    }',
'    TRANSPORT.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'    with TRANSPORT.open("a", encoding="utf-8") as f:',
'        f.write(json.dumps(delivery, ensure_ascii=False) + "\\n")',
'    result = {"sent": 1 if ok else 0, "failed": 0 if ok else 1, "skipped": 0, "status": delivery["status"]}',
'state = {}',
'if STATE.exists():',
'    try:',
'        state = json.loads(STATE.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))',
'    except Exception:',
'        state = {}',
'state["telegram_sender_last_run"] = result',
'STATE.write_text(json.dumps(state, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + "\\n", encoding="utf-8")',
'print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False))',
]
recorder.write_text('\n'.join(recorder_lines) + '\n')

wf = workflows / 'telegram-outbox-sender.yml'
wf_lines = [
'name: Telegram Outbox Sender',
'',
'on:',
'  workflow_dispatch:',
'    inputs:',
'      dry_run:',
'        description: Synthetic delivery_result without Telegram API call',
'        required: false',
'        default: "false"',
'        type: choice',
'        options:',
'          - "false"',
'          - "true"',
'',
'permissions:',
'  contents: write',
'',
'jobs:',
'  send:',
'    name: Send Telegram outbox',
'    runs-on: ubuntu-latest',
'    steps:',
'      - uses: actions/checkout@v4',
'      - name: Pick queued message',
'        continue-on-error: true',
'        run: python3 scripts/telegram_outbox_pick.py',
'      - name: Send or dry-run',
'        continue-on-error: true',
'        env:',
'          TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN }}',
'          TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID: ${{ secrets.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID }}',
'          TELEGRAM_DRY_RUN: ${{ inputs.dry_run }}',
'        run: |',
'          python3 - <<PY',
'          import json',
'          from pathlib import Path',
'          pick = json.loads(Path("governance/tmp/telegram_pick.json").read_text())',
'          Path("governance/tmp/message.txt").write_text(pick.get("message", ""), encoding="utf-8")',
'          PY',
'          if [ "${TELEGRAM_DRY_RUN}" = "true" ]; then',
'            echo "sent_synthetic" > governance/tmp/telegram_status.txt',
'          elif [ -z "${TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN}" ] || [ -z "${TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID}" ]; then',
'            echo "missing_runtime_secret" > governance/tmp/telegram_status.txt',
'          else',
'            MSG=$(cat governance/tmp/message.txt)',
'            HTTP_CODE=$(curl -sS -o governance/tmp/telegram_response.json -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "https://api.telegram.org/bot${TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN}/sendMessage" --data-urlencode "chat_id=${TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID}" --data-urlencode "text=${MSG}" --data-urlencode "disable_web_page_preview=true" || echo "000")',
'            if [ "${HTTP_CODE}" = "200" ]; then echo "sent" > governance/tmp/telegram_status.txt; else echo "telegram_http_${HTTP_CODE}" > governance/tmp/telegram_status.txt; fi',
'          fi',
'      - name: Record delivery result',
'        continue-on-error: true',
'        run: python3 scripts/telegram_delivery_record.py',
'      - name: Commit delivery results',
'        continue-on-error: true',
'        run: |',
'          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"',
'          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"',
'          git add governance/transport/results.jsonl governance/state/contour_status.json',
'          git commit -m "Telegram outbox delivery result" || echo "No changes"',
'          git push',
]
wf.write_text('\n'.join(wf_lines) + '\n')

protocol = protocols / 'TELEGRAM_LIVE_SETUP_OPERATOR_ACTIONS.md'
protocol.write_text('# BEM-544 | Telegram Live Setup Operator Actions\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 14:35 (UTC+3)\n\n## Что сделано\n- `.github/workflows/telegram-outbox-sender.yml` готов к live отправке.\n- `scripts/telegram_outbox_pick.py` выбирает queued message.\n- `scripts/telegram_delivery_record.py` пишет delivery result.\n- Токены не записываются в файлы.\n\n## Что требуется от оператора\nНужно добавить в GitHub Actions Secrets:\n\n| Secret | Что положить |\n|---|---|\n| `TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN` | токен бота |\n| `TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID` | id чата/канала/группы |\n\nТокен в чат GPT присылать не нужно.\n')

queued = {'record_type':'telegram_hourly_report','cycle_id':'bem544-live-telegram-sender','delivery_mode':'telegram-outbox-sender.yml','canonical':True,'status':'queued_for_sender','message':'BEM-544 live Telegram sender ready | 2026-05-17 | 14:35 (UTC+3) | waiting runtime secrets','created_at':'2026-05-17 | 14:35 (UTC+3)','blocker':None,'security':'no token in file; runtime secrets only'}
with outbox.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(json.dumps(queued, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
with transport.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    tr = dict(queued)
    tr['record_type'] = 'telegram_live_sender_ready'
    tr['artifact_path'] = 'governance/telegram_outbox.jsonl'
    tr['commit_sha'] = None
    f.write(json.dumps(tr, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

contour = {}
if state_path.exists():
    try:
        contour = json.loads(state_path.read_text())
    except Exception:
        contour = {}
contour['updated_at'] = '2026-05-17 | 14:35 (UTC+3)'
contour['telegram_live_sender'] = {'workflow':'.github/workflows/telegram-outbox-sender.yml','required_runtime_secrets':['TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN','TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID'],'status':'repo_side_ready_waiting_runtime_secrets','blocker':'RUNTIME_SECRETS_REQUIRED_FOR_LIVE_SEND'}
contour['blocker'] = {'code':'RUNTIME_SECRETS_REQUIRED_FOR_LIVE_SEND','message':'Add TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID to GitHub Actions Secrets; do not store in files.'}
state_path.write_text(json.dumps(contour, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

report = reports / 'bem544_live_telegram_sender_implementation.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-544 | Live Telegram Sender Implementation | REPO-SIDE READY\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 14:35 (UTC+3)\n\n## Выполнено\n- Workflow `.github/workflows/telegram-outbox-sender.yml` создан.\n- Picker/recorder scripts созданы.\n- Queued test message добавлен.\n\n## Blocker\n`RUNTIME_SECRETS_REQUIRED_FOR_LIVE_SEND` до добавления GitHub Actions Secrets: `TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN`, `TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID`.\n')

proof = proofs / 'bem544_live_telegram_sender_impl_v3.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-544 v3 repo-side live Telegram sender implemented without urllib. Runtime secrets required.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(picker), str(recorder), str(wf), str(protocol), str(outbox), str(transport), str(state_path), str(report), str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('BEM-544 v3 implemented Telegram sender without urllib using workflow shell curl')
"""
No issue comments.
